childhood.education: Jilin University of Technology, major in mechanical design (1987)
childhood.earlyLife: Born in the 1960s in Jiangxi Province, Zou Zhinong pursued technical education during China's reform era. He studied mechanical design at Jilin University of Technology and completed his studies in 1987, positioning himself for the technological opportunities emerging during China's economic opening.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1960년대 중국 장시성에서 태어난 주진옹은 중국의 개혁 개방기에 기술 교육을 추구했다. 지린공업대학교에서 기계설계를 전공하고 1987년 학업을 완료하여 중국의 경제 개방 중 나타나는 기술적 기회에 대비했다.

careerTimeline.event: Graduated from Jilin University of Technology with degree in mechanical design
Transferred to Siping Dazhong Computer Co., Ltd. as general manager; began exploring computer technology
careerTimeline.eventKo: Siping Dazhong Computer Co., Ltd.로 이사하여 총무 이사로서 컴퓨터 기술 탐색 시작

careerTimeline.event: Founded Suzhou Industrial Park Mingzhan Technology Engineering Co., Ltd., focusing on optical communication systems integration and testing
careerTimeline.eventKo: 광통신 시스템 통합 및 테스트에 중점을 두고 Suzhou Industrial Park Mingzhan Technology Engineering Co., Ltd. 설립

careerTimeline.event: Co-founded Suzhou Tianfu Precision Ceramics Co., Ltd. with partner Zhu Guodong; later renamed Tianfu Communications; focused on passive devices for optical communication
careerTimeline.eventKo: 파트너 Zhu Guodong과 함께 Suzhou Tianfu Precision Ceramics Co., Ltd. 공동 설립; 나중에 Tianfu Communications로 개명; 광통신 패시브 소자에 중점

careerTimeline.event: Expanded Suzhou TFC Optical Communication product lines and established partnerships with major optical module manufacturers worldwide
careerTimeline.eventKo: Suzhou TFC Optical Communication의 제품 라인 확대 및 전 세계 주요 광 모듈 제조업체와의 파트너십 확립

careerTimeline.event: Company has grown to 15 product lines in advanced materials including precision ceramics, engineering plastics, composite metals, and optical glass
careerTimeline.eventKo: 회사는 정밀 세라믹, 엔지니어링 플라스틱, 복합 금속 및 광학 유리를 포함한 고급 재료의 15개 제품 라인으로 성장

personalTraits.knownFor: Founder and chairman of Suzhou TFC Optical Communication; pioneering Chinese manufacturer of high-precision optical communication components; broke Japan's technology monopoly in ceramic tube production; developed comprehensive optical communication solutions from basic materials to finished products
personalTraits.knownForKo: Suzhou TFC Optical Communication의 창립자 및 회장; 고정밀 광통신 부품의 선도적 중국 제조업체; 세라믹 튜브 생산에서 일본의 기술 독점 타파; 기본 재료에서 완성된 제품까지 포괄적인 광통신 솔루션 개발
